n: Amdân Dammul, the Bloody Threshold -- Tier 1

steps.t: Prince Durin of the Longbeards is ready to lead the charge on Gundabad. You should advance with the dwarf army!
Gorgar's trap has been sprung, and you must now fight in his arena or perish. You should defeat Gorgar's Beasts of Slaughter.
You have defeated the beasts, but Gorgar now intends to fight you himself! You must now face Gorgar the Ruthless and Ránulur, Chieftain of Wargs in th…
